chunks.text: Avideh Zakhor featured in interview by bigthink.com - EECS at Berkeley Prof. Avideh Zakhor is featured in a video interview by bigthink.com titled “ Smart Tech: Phones, Drones and Interior Mapping ”. Prof. Zakhor’s research interests include digital signal processing and its applications to 2D and 3D image and video processing, and communications. Applications of her research range from helping emergency rescue teams navigate in times of crisis, to boosting our comfort with Smart Homes. Categories Faculty Research View Open Faculty Positions
